title: VELOCITY
definition: WE DO NOT MOVE. TIME DOES.

images.alt: VELOCITY 01 — TIME PUSHES FIRST. Monochrome urban motion photograph exploring time, movement, and directional force within the city.
VELOCITY 02 — THE CROWD HAS NO FACE. Monochrome street movement study capturing collective motion and urban flow.
VELOCITY 03 — WE CROSS WITHOUT ARRIVING. Dynamic monochrome city photograph expressing transition and continuous motion.
VELOCITY 04 — VELOCITY ERASES THE SELF. High-contrast monochrome urban photograph exploring speed, anonymity, and temporal force.
